name: Boston Properties, Inc.
description: Boston Properties, Inc. (BXP) is the largest publicly traded developer, owner, and manager of premier workplace finishes in the United States, concentrated in six dynamic gateway markets: Boston, Los Angeles, New York, San Francisco, Seattle, and Washington, DC. BXP is a fully integrated real estate investment trust (REIT) that develops, manages, operates, acquires, and owns a diverse portfolio of primarily Class A office space, as well as residential, retail, and active-destination properties.
